nasb.text: For they do not speak peace, But they devise deceitful words against those who are quiet in the land.

esv.text: For they do not speak peace, but against those who are quiet in the land they devise words of deceit.

cnv.text: 因為他們不說和睦的話， 卻計劃詭詐的事， 陷害世上的安靜人。

ccb.text: 他们言语暴戾， 谋害安分守己的人。

csbs.text: 因为他们不说平安的话， 却针对地上安分的人谋算欺诈的事；
